name: Unconventional Roommate // Flint Shale
description:
After your last apartment flooded, you moved into a new place. Unfortunately for you, your new rooommate is your stalker that you've been trying to get away from.

Oh boy, here we go again... Mentally ill Moordale resident.... blah, blah, blah, they stalk you, yadda yadda. You get the drill.

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+
